title: Autodesk to present at upcoming investor conferences
text: SAN FRANCISCO , Aug. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) today announced its executives will be speaking at the following investor conferences: September 6, 2023    Citi's 2023 Global Technology Conference September 6, 2023    Goldman Sachs Communacopia + Technology Conference A live webcast and replay of the presentations will be available through Autodesk's Investor Relations Website at investors.autodesk.com. Please go to the website 15 minutes early to register, download and install any necessary software.

title: Autodesk 2Q financial results beat estimates; company boosts guidance
text: Autodesk (NASDAQ:ADSK), Inc after Wednesday's close announced that its second-quarter fiscal 2024 revenue rose 9% year over year to $1.35 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus estimate of $1.32 billion.  Its earnings per share (EPS) for the period of $1.91 also exceeded expectations by $0.18.

title: Autodesk's stock jumps 7% on revenue, earnings beat
text: Shares of Autodesk Inc. ADSK, +1.88% climbed 7% in extended trading Wednesday after the software company reported quarterly results that topped analyst revenue and earnings estimates. Autodesk reported fiscal second-quarter net income of $222 million, or $1.03 a share, compared with net income of $186 million, or 85 cents a share, in the year-ago quarter.
